executives.name: Olivier Pomel
executives.background: Olivier Pomel is our co-founder and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and a member of our board of directors since our inception in 2010. Prior to founding Datadog, Mr. Pomel was a Vice President of Technology at Wireless Generation, a SaaS education company, until its acquisition by News Corp. Mr. Pomel holds an M.S. in Computer Science from the École Centrale Paris.

executives.name: Alexis Lê-Quôc
executives.background: Alexis Lê-Quôc is our co-founder and has served as our President, Chief Technology Officer and a member of our board of directors since our inception in 2010. Prior to founding Datadog, Mr. Lê-Quôc was a Director of Operations at Wireless Generation. Mr. Lê-Quôc holds an M.S. in Computer Science from the École Centrale Paris.

executives.name: David Obstler
executives.background: David Obstler has served as our Chief Financial Officer since 2018. Prior to joining Datadog, Mr. Obstler was the Chief Financial Officer of TravelClick, a hospitality technology company. He has also served as CFO at OpenLink Financial, MSCI Inc., and RiskMetrics Group. Mr. Obstler holds a B.A. from Yale University and an M.B.A. from Harvard Business School.

executives.name: Adam Blitzer
executives.background: Adam Blitzer has served as our Chief Operating Officer since 2021. Prior to joining Datadog, Mr. Blitzer held various executive roles at Salesforce, including Executive Vice President and General Manager of Digital (Marketing Cloud, Commerce Cloud, and Experience Cloud). He was the co-founder of Pardot, which was acquired by Salesforce. Mr. Blitzer holds a B.A. from Duke University.

executives.name: Laszlo Kopits
executives.background: Laszlo Kopits has served as our General Counsel since 2017. Prior to joining Datadog, Mr. Kopits was the General Counsel of Dealertrack Technologies, Inc. and held various legal roles at Thomson Reuters. Mr. Kopits holds a B.A. from Johns Hopkins University and a J.D. from Columbia Law School.

board_of_directors.name: Dev Ittycheria
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of MongoDB, Inc. Previously co-founder and CEO of BladeLogic.

board_of_directors.name: Julie Richardson
board_of_directors.background: Former Managing Director at Providence Equity Partners and former head of the New York office of JP Morgan.

board_of_directors.name: Titi Cole
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Legacy Franchises at Citigroup. Previously held executive roles at Wells Fargo and Bank of America.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Callahan
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Vice President and General Counsel of LinkedIn and former Executive Vice President and General Counsel of Yahoo!.
